name: Vegetable Quesadillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 1/2 teaspoons of oil in a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. Add onions and carrot to the pan. Cook over low heat for 3 minutes or until onions are soft but not brown.
3. Stir in zucchini and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and jalapeno peppers. Cook until heated through.
5. Heat remaining oil in a large, heavy non-stick skillet.
6. Cook one tortilla at a time until lightly browned, about 30 seconds. Turn and spoon 1/4 of the vegetable mixture and 1/4 of goat cheese onto half of the tortilla.
7. Fold the other half of the tortilla over the filling.
8. Slide the quesadilla onto a warm serving plate.
9. Repeat with remaining tortillas and serve immediately.
